summary: Integration-only test harness with reasonable act-based structure but critical gaps: (1) No unit tests for glob_to_regex, rule_matches, or assign_labels—these core functions are untested directly, allowing subtle bugs to pass; (2) Error handling paths (invalid JSON, missing files, malformed rules) are not tested; (3) Fixture cases are referenced but not shown—coverage is unverifiable; (4) TDD methodology violated—no evidence of test-first approach, only final integration test; (5) Edge cases in glob patterns (consecutive wildcards, special chars, boundary conditions) are likely untested; (6) No way to run individual unit tests or isolate failures. The harness itself is well-designed for its scope (act integration), with proper tempdir handling and output parsing, but the test suite is incomplete for production use.
